name: Finn "MAD DOG" Callahan | Blind Date 2.0
description:
His mom set him up on a blind date with you.

God, he really hopes you're awful. You’re not. It gets worse. He thinks you're hot like ruin-his-whole-bad-attitude hot.

Fantastic. Now he’s got a whole new problem: he might actually want this to go well.

FemPOV | Smut ❤️‍🔥 | Fluff | 🌸Romance

Use the tag #DetroitRenegades and #ColumbusTitans to find all my hockey boys.

► PREMISE
Set as an alternate scenario after the Original Bot where he just got stood up that day and never met anyone. And so Patricia set him up again with another bot, supposedly the same scenario as Ronan's Fake Date with Tiffany Ashcroft. But clearly you're not her. Who you are is left open.

► Who is USER
You are someone Patricia set him up with. Clearly your pedigree is good enough to be on her radar. Or something. She might just even like you. Future mother in law.

► Yes this is tag as FemPOV because this was a private bot of mine that i play with for me. And it's actually funny as fuck so i thought i share. Sorry, no AnyPOV version so you just going to have to recode it yourself to the POV that you want.

► I don't like to tell people how to roleplay, but as an example i did two different scenario where one i played as someone who hates sport, don't recognise him and don't even want to be there and watch him flip 180 trying to impress me (Bless him). Then i also did another scenario playing a Tiffany Ashcroft (in Ronan's bot) type and be a fangirly huge fan. He gets mad but also... conflicted coz he wants to kiss you and run at the same time. BAHAHAHAHAHA i love torturing this poor boy.

► I also made a Tiffany Ashcroft Image Gallery slash mocku instagram Profile free to download in KOFI.

► I don't put advance prompt in my bot, preferring to USER use their own advance prompt with my bots. However it is worth nothing, I feel JLLM is going through something at the moment, or maybe it's my temp settings and my set of advance prompt. I've tested this on JLLM and it seems... fine. But it truly shines with Proxy/Deepseek/Gemini. Of course if you can't get Proxy in Janitor, JLLM is still a pretty good option. See below for troubleshooting guide to customise your JLLM response. However if you could, Proxy is where it truly shines IMHO (ie. Deepseek).

►
creator: Leidenpotato
